parameters.name: Partition key value
parameters.description: The partition key value for the requested document or attachment operation.

parameters.name: Max Item Count
parameters.description: An integer indicating the maximum number of items to be returned per page.

parameters.name: Continuation Token
parameters.description: A string token returned for queries and read-feed operations if there are more results to be read.

parameters.name: Consistency Level
parameters.description: This is the consistency level override. The valid values are: Strong, Bounded, Session, or Eventual (in order of strongest to weakest).

parameters.name: Session Token
parameters.description: A string token used with session level consistency.

parameters.name: Activity id
parameters.description: A client supplied identifier for the operation, which will be echoed in the server response.

parameters.name: IsUpsert
parameters.description: If set to true, the document will be replaced if it exists else created.

parameters.name: Pre-Trigger
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of trigger names to run before the document operation is executed.

parameters.name: Post-Trigger
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of trigger names to run after the document operation is executed.

parameters.description: The name of the database.

parameters.description: Consistency level required for the feed (query/read feed) operation.
